sponsors.name: Coca-Cola
sponsors.activation: Coca-Cola Fan Zone outside Gate C. Enjoy interactive goalie challenges, custom photo booths, and ice-cold drinks in 100% plant-based bottles.
sponsors.promo: Scan the QR code at the Fan Zone to win a free Coca-Cola cup holder made of ocean plastics!

sponsors.name: Adidas
sponsors.activation: Adidas Speed Academy outside Gate A. Test your kick velocity, experience virtual reality penalty shootouts against Alisson Becker, and check out historical World Cup match balls.
sponsors.promo: Complete the kick challenge to receive a 15% discount code for official Adidas gear.

sponsors.name: Visa
sponsors.activation: Visa Cashless Concourse. Visa is the preferred payment partner. Get priority lanes at all concessions when using contactless payments or Google/Apple Pay with a Visa card.
sponsors.promo: Get a $5 rebate on your first purchase of $30 or more at the official merchandise store using Visa.

sponsors.name: Hyundai / Kia
sponsors.activation: Hyundai Goal of the Century display in American Airlines Plaza (SoFi). Check out the new electric vehicle lineup and participate in soccer-tennis tournaments.
sponsors.promo: Register at the booth to get free shuttle transport vouchers from the stadium parking lots to the entries.
